title: heterotheca oregona var. compacta
intro: Heterotheca oregona var. compacta, also known as Oregon sunshine, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Heterotheca oregona var. compacta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
